title:
Lesson 1:
Better / Better Not
description: 'Daha iyi' = better. 'Çok daha iyi' = much better. 'Daha iyi olur' = it would be better / that's better. 'Daha iyi olmaz' = better not / it would be better not to. Use these to express preferences and weigh options.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Bu gece mi çıkıyoruz yoksa yarın mı?
dialogue.english: Are we going out tonight or tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Tomorrow is better. I'm tired today.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What if we go out for dinner? What do you say?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Daha iyi olmaz. Evde yemek çok daha iyi.
dialogue.english: Better not. Food at home is much better.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Haklısın. Evde kalmak daha iyi olur.
dialogue.english: You're right. It would be better to stay home.

vocabulary.english: it would be better / that's better
